Powers.name: Form Matter
Powers.effect:
Creatures suffer 1D6 automatic wounds with S: 10 AP: -2 D: 1; Seeking. 
Vehicles suffer 1D3 glancing hits with AT(1); Seeking.

Powers.name: Transdimensional Manipulation
Powers.effect: Roll 1D6 for each model in the target unit. For every 3+ it suffers an automatic wound with S: 5 AP: 0 D: 1; Sunder(2). Can't cause more than 10 wounds in a single activation.

Powers.name: Time's Arrow (only for Star Vampire C'tans)
Powers.effect: The target suffers one automatic hit with S: D AP: -4 D: 3; AT(4), Seeking.
